creator: frankmwuest@yahoo.de
text:
Vlc builds fine, but only audio playback is possible. Any video file I tried results in vlc freezing at the first frame with excessive CPU load. Audio files work fine. Peculiarity: I'm running an i386 OS on an amd64 CPU.

How-To-Repeat: This happened on 8.2-RELEASE as well with any version of vlc after 2.0 (tried several times). Hence, I'm sticking with vlc-1.1.13_6,3 until further notice.
